game_name: Quest for Glory: So You Want to Be a Hero

special_mechanics.name: Stamina System
special_mechanics.description: Character becomes tired from running and fighting, requiring rest and sleep

special_mechanics.name: Hunger System
special_mechanics.description: Main character must eat on a regular basis

special_mechanics.name: Day/Night Cycle
special_mechanics.description: Passage of time tracked with situation and scenery changes between day and night

tier_notes: Tier 2: This is an adventure/RPG hybrid with gameplay mechanics focused on story, exploration, and character statistics rather than precise physics-based movement. The available Wikipedia source contains no documented physics parameters such as movement speeds, gravity values, jump mechanics, or sub-pixel systems. Movement is handled through command parsing (original) or point-and-click interface (remake), not physics simulation.
